$comment: vcpkg port manifest for d4np-c. Use as an overlay port (--overlay-ports) until the port is upstreamed to the vcpkg registry. The version tracks d4np/core/version.h (consistency lint enforces lockstep).
name: d4np-c
description: Dependency-free, high-performance C11 systems utility library (allocators, containers, concurrency, strings, I/O, diagnostics).
